message:
test(proptest): add 7 property tests for ARS symbolic exec coverage gaps

New tests covering untested safety types:
- SafetyViolation serde roundtrip (varied fields)
- SafetyViolations serde roundtrip (0-5 violations)
- SafetyVerdict::Unsafe serde roundtrip + is_safe/is_unsafe
- SymExecConfig with extra_banned/safe_binaries roundtrip
- SymExecConfig Default roundtrip
- ViolationCategory all-distinct JSON
- Extra banned binaries enforcement

Total: 16→23 tests (7 new), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
